question: Will Trailer 3 for Grand Theft Auto 6 be released by June 15, 2026?
reason: Rockstar Games has confirmed that marketing for GTA 6, including Trailer 3, will begin in summer 2026, after June 15.
evidence: Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick confirmed that Rockstar's full marketing push for GTA 6 won't kick off until summer, with Trailer 3 expected between June 21 and September 22.
Rockstar Games announced that GTA 6 is set to release on November 19, 2026, and that marketing will commence in the summer of 2026.
No official announcement has been made regarding the release of Trailer 3 before June 15, 2026.
